args.code: (() => { const modal = document.getElementById('modal-overlay'); const toast = document.getElementById('toast-container'); return {modalDisplay: modal ? window.getComputedStyle(modal).display : 'no-modal', modalVisible: modal ? modal.classList.contains('show') : false, anyModal: document.querySelector('.modal-overlay, [class*=modal]') ? 'yes' : 'no', toastCount: toast ? toast.children.length : 0}; })()
